texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: DOW™ XUS180808 Reverse Osmosis Element
texts.text: DOW™ XUS180808 Reverse Osmosis Element

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Ultra-High Pressure, High-Rejection, Reverse Osmosis Elements for Industrial Water Purification
texts.text: Ultra-High Pressure, High-Rejection, Reverse Osmosis Elements for Industrial Water Purification

texts.label: text
texts.orig: The DOW™ XUS180808 Reverse Osmosis Element is an ultra-high pressure element offering an industry wide unique combination of features:
texts.text: The DOW™ XUS180808 Reverse Osmosis Element is an ultra-high pressure element offering an industry wide unique combination of features:

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig:  Up to 120 bar (1,740 psi), ultra-high feed pressure capability due to special element and membrane design
texts.text:  Up to 120 bar (1,740 psi), ultra-high feed pressure capability due to special element and membrane design

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig:  Increasing the overall efficiency of Zero-Liquid-Discharge (ZLD) by achieving highest solute concentrations thus reducing the size of downstream thermal treatment
texts.text:  Increasing the overall efficiency of Zero-Liquid-Discharge (ZLD) by achieving highest solute concentrations thus reducing the size of downstream thermal treatment

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig:  Excellent for recovery of salts in process streams
texts.text:  Excellent for recovery of salts in process streams

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig:  Robust DOW FILMTEC™ reverse osmosis (RO) membrane sheet;
texts.text:  Robust DOW FILMTEC™ reverse osmosis (RO) membrane sheet;

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig:  34 mil feed spacer to lessen the impact of fouling on the pressure drop across a vessel and to enhance cleaning effectiveness.
texts.text:  34 mil feed spacer to lessen the impact of fouling on the pressure drop across a vessel and to enhance cleaning effectiveness.

texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: Product Type
texts.text: Product Type

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Spiral-wound element with polyamide thin-film composite membrane
texts.text: Spiral-wound element with polyamide thin-film composite membrane

texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: Product Specifications
texts.text: Product Specifications

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: 1. Permeate flow and salt (NaCl) rejection based on the following standard test conditions: 32,000 ppm NaCl, 800 psi (55 bar), 77° F (25° C), pH 8, 8% recovery.
texts.text: Permeate flow and salt (NaCl) rejection based on the following standard test conditions: 32,000 ppm NaCl, 800 psi (55 bar), 77° F (25° C), pH 8, 8% recovery.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: 2. Flow rates for individual elements may vary but will be no more than ±  15%.
texts.text: Flow rates for individual elements may vary but will be no more than ±  15%.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: 3. Sales specifications may vary as design revisions take place.
texts.text: Sales specifications may vary as design revisions take place.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: 4. Active area guaranteed ±  3%. Active area as stated by Dow Water & Process Solutions is not comparable to nominal membrane area often stated by some manufacturers. Measurement method described in Form No. 609-00434.
texts.text: Active area guaranteed ±  3%. Active area as stated by Dow Water & Process Solutions is not comparable to nominal membrane area often stated by some manufacturers. Measurement method described in Form No. 609-00434.

texts.label: footnote
texts.orig: 1. Refer to Dow Water & Process Solutions Design Guidelines for multiple-element applications. 1 inch = 25.4 mm
texts.text: 1. Refer to Dow Water & Process Solutions Design Guidelines for multiple-element applications. 1 inch = 25.4 mm

texts.label: footnote
texts.orig: 2. Element to fit nominal 8-inch (203-mm) I.D. pressure vessel.
texts.text: 2. Element to fit nominal 8-inch (203-mm) I.D. pressure vessel.

texts.label: footnote
texts.orig: a  Maximum temperature for continuous operation above pH 10 is 95  F (35  C).
texts.text: a  Maximum temperature for continuous operation above pH 10 is 95  F (35  C).

texts.label: footnote
texts.orig: b  Refer to guidelines in specification sheet 609-23010 for more information.
texts.text: b  Refer to guidelines in specification sheet 609-23010 for more information.

texts.label: footnote
texts.orig: c  Under certain conditions, the presence of free chlorine and other oxidizing agents will cause premature membrane failure. Since oxidation damage is not covered under warranty, Dow Water & Process Solutions recommends removing residual free chlorine by pretreatment prior to membrane exposure. Please refer to technical bulletin 609-22010 for more information.
texts.text: c  Under certain conditions, the presence of free chlorine and other oxidizing agents will cause premature membrane failure. Since oxidation damage is not covered under warranty, Dow Water & Process Solutions recommends removing residual free chlorine by pretreatment prior to membrane exposure. Please refer to technical bulletin 609-22010 for more information.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Dow has a fundamental concern for all who make, distribute, and use its products, and for the environment in which we live. This concern is the basis for our product stewardship philosophy by which we assess the safety, health, and environmental information on our products and then take appropriate steps to protect employee and public health and our environment. The success of our product stewardship program rests with each and every individual involved with Dow products-from the initial concept and research, to manufacture, use, sale, disposal, and recycle of each product.
texts.text: Dow has a fundamental concern for all who make, distribute, and use its products, and for the environment in which we live. This concern is the basis for our product stewardship philosophy by which we assess the safety, health, and environmental information on our products and then take appropriate steps to protect employee and public health and our environment. The success of our product stewardship program rests with each and every individual involved with Dow products-from the initial concept and research, to manufacture, use, sale, disposal, and recycle of each product.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Dow strongly encourages its customers to review both their manufacturing processes and their applications of Dow products from the standpoint of human health and environmental quality to ensure that Dow products are not used in ways for which they are not intended or tested. Dow personnel are available to answer your questions and to provide reasonable technical support.
texts.text: Dow strongly encourages its customers to review both their manufacturing processes and their applications of Dow products from the standpoint of human health and environmental quality to ensure that Dow products are not used in ways for which they are not intended or tested. Dow personnel are available to answer your questions and to provide reasonable technical support.

texts.orig: Notice: The use of this product in and of itself does not necessarily guarantee the removal of cysts and pathogens from water. Effective cyst and pathogen reduction is dependent on the complete system design and on the operation and maintenance of the system.
texts.text: Notice: The use of this product in and of itself does not necessarily guarantee the removal of cysts and pathogens from water. Effective cyst and pathogen reduction is dependent on the complete system design and on the operation and maintenance of the system.
